title: Hand Swing Changer
description: Adds the ability to change the hand swing duration.
body:
This mod adds the ability to change the duration of the swing animation in [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).

**By default, the mod is configured to work for swords only**, but you can change it in the [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) settings.
![Mod settings in Mod Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/619b74e51c8c22e02864a13839b7630e266ccdcd_0.webp)
